creative_brief: Split-screen map showing 200km radius around Sydney vs long transport routes to distant farms, with fresh beef cuts in foreground.
primary_text: 85% of FarmThru's partner farms are within 200km of Sydney. Compare that to supermarket beef averaging 2,400km. Rachel's Farm cattle graze regenerative pastures near Kempsey. Her beef reaches our Brookvale hub in hours, not weeks. No middlemen inflating prices. Order Monday to Friday, collect fresh. We can't promise returns, but early supporters get VIP access from $5 refundable deposit.
headline: 85% of our farms are under 200km away
description: Rachel's Farm beef: 200km to your table, not 2,400km. Equity crowdfunding live on Birchal. Not financial advice.
